name: Sales Operations Teams in Marketing Agencies processing 10–20 commission statements/week tool
description: For Sales Operations Teams in Marketing Agencies processing 10–20 commission statements/week, manual compilation causes delayed payments. We automate the emailing of commission statements instead of manual compilation and emailing.
